territories-compliance.png.note: Sales > Territories, Compliance tab (default), Lumon Fresh selected in the Single Brand Selector. State list (flag, filing status badges, deal count) beside the interactive map. Agent-captured 2026-07-17 at 1680x1050 CSS viewport, 2x, full sidebar+navbar included per current operator-shot convention. Cosmetic fix: hid the unselected 'Staging Test Brand' chip (display:none) so only real-looking brands show. dom-sanitize with freshenDates:false. No cursor -- read-only orientation state.

territories-bulk-assign-fdd.png.note: Compliance tab, Texas + Colorado selected via row checkboxes, 'Assign FDD' bulk-toolbar button clicked to open the FDD asset picker. Agent-captured 2026-07-17. Cosmetic fixes: hid 'Staging Test Brand' chip; renamed 3 seed FDD asset filenames ('best_fdd_ever', 'kbv-syd-boarding-pass.pdf', 'my-bus-ticket.pdf' -> Lumon_Fresh_FDD_2026.pdf / _2025.pdf / _Amendment.pdf) via DOM text swap -- no feature or state fabricated, only filename text. dom-sanitize with freshenDates:false. Cursor on the Assign FDD trigger button (not the open picker), per dropdown convention.

territories-deal-zones.png.note: Deal Zones tab, Lumon Fresh selected. Zone list (state flag, zone name, assigned entity, deal count X/Y) beside the map with highlighted zone shapes; 'Draw Deal Zone' button top right. Agent-captured 2026-07-17. Testing'/'Maximilian Mäser -- Demo'->Rocky Mountain Holdings, 'Email Me'->Peachtree Ventures) via DOM text swap on exact/substring matches -- counts, structure, and 'Unassigned' rows (a real product state) left untouched. dom-sanitize with freshenDates:false. Cursor on Draw Deal Zone button (referenced by the 'Creating a Deal Zone' how-to, not activated -- entering draw mode needs no click to convey the entry point).
